reviews.review_description: Super fun game. Super nice to have a very good lacrosse game on vr. Way better than some other sport games.

reviews.review_title: It is good but it just get me mad
reviews.review_description: I’m playing season mode trying to win the championship but it is hard when you can’t catch up  to the players on the other team  and ￼the shooting system ￼why is the shooting system is the head instead of the stick but I like it￼￼￼￼
It’s an amazing game and the season mode is awesome but sometimes the keeper just throws the ball out of bounds in the reset

developer_response.body: We found that goalie clearing glitch and fixed it yesterday; sadly our high school goalie still throws ball to the other team, which code can't fix :) Thanks for the support!

reviews.review_description: Okay ngl this game isn’t realistic and buggy at times BUT FOR ME PERSONALLY i don’t mind it i’ve been playing this game religiously for a year and a half now and with the devs consistently updating the game every month this game was no where near how it was a year ago and i can only imagine the improvements and stuff they will add throughout 2026 if your looking for a realistic game this isn’t for you but if your looking for something kinda arcady and relax and relive playing lax without actually stepping onto a field  and just get buckets this is for you I will say though the only thing that bothers me is the ai is terrible you could put the difficulty for the opposing team to pro and your team ai will still be club level like they need to fix that asap and another thing i get random penalties sometimes but other than that i love the game !

THE game can be nice but the only things you need to work on it programing the goalie a little better because when I ran out for an outlet the goalie lunches the ball not to me but out of bounds. Add new features to not saying it will be easy but your fan base will def grow if u add a multi-player mode because the ai wont be so accurate but its a really fun game and simulates lacrosse alot good job

developer_response.body: Appreciate the feedback, we will work on goalie clearing passes for sure!  Actually, the goalie will get a bigger upgrade and may even clear the ball themselves in the near future!

reviews.review_title: My honest to god game review
reviews.review_description:
-I install the game
-train for 5 minutes 
-go into a game
-throw the ball at my own goal like a dummy
-figure it out and kicked some butt
-played for some more whilst my teammates were playing boxing
-Went into the shadow realm 
10/5

developer_response.body: appreciate it!  lol, we probably need a tutorial so there are no own goals!

reviews.review_description: I think that this is a really good game, but one thing I really want to do is to be able to play with friends. You should be able to put in a private code and go against your friend, and do face offs against each other and all that.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review!   We did experiment with multi-player last year, but didn't like the performance and the person hosting the game had a big latency advantage and the Meta rooms for starting/joining were too klunky.  We are going to re-write a multiplayer game using new tools so it will be fair for all players.  Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: The game is good but the thing that’s most annoying is that i’m trying to pass the ball and sometimes it just shoots it at the goal anyway when I’m not even looking there

developer_response.body: thanks for feedback.  you can force a pass in that situation by pressing the B button, if the shooting aim laser is on, releasing the main trigger will shoot.  we are looking to make changes in the controls soon which should address your issue.

reviews.review_description: So fun goalie is very realistic

so win reality Helps with baseball and lax vr 
is way better because i have never played lacrosse and i'm already going to be trying out for my lacrosse team all because of the game.

developer_response.body: amazing! so happy we may have played a small role!

reviews.review_description: When I was playing this game I was hoping for this to be realistic, It was not. When I was playing the cpu would randomly get a speed boost making it almost impossible to stop them. The customizable jerseys look really ugly. I would shoot it top right and then the game would just make it go straight into the goalie’s chest. Overall, it is cool that there is a lacrosse game for vr but it could be a lot better. It also used to be really easy to knock the ball loose and put defenders on the ground now it is kind of hard.

I got the dlc thinking the 10v10 would be on a huge field so i could feel like i was playing a real game, but boy was i wrong tho, its the same field as 6v6 with 4 more players and the same rules, what a scam, and the goalie work out mode is also a scam the ball glitches through the stick half the time making it un playable. I want my money back.

developer_response.body: sorry the DLC was disappointing for you.  10v10 mode has longstick defenders, offsides, and a coaching mode where you can make line changes and implement different coaching tactics.  The DLC also has a dodging mode.  We haven't had many complaints about the goalie stick, but next release are improving the physics around collisions so we hope you re-try.

reviews.review_description: It helps me me a lot after playing this game for 2 hours one day the same day I had a game and got 3 goals that game, the game help me out a lot and more and more people should try it.
Not fully realistic with some minor physics issues but for a few lax bros this is a great game. Fun play but wish you could adjust time length.
this game is probably the best sports game ive played in a while. beautiful mechanics, and amazing tourney mode.

The only thing I would say that rlly needs to be improved is probably the stick checks with a d-pole sometime you will hit them directly on the lacrosse stick and nothing will happen, if this gets fixed the game will be near perfect. Awesome game tho!

developer_response.body: illegal pockets i bet!   thanks for the feedback,, will look to improve that mechanic for sure!

reviews.review_description: Good game recommend playing and buying it  fun tourney play game actually control buttons for the game make sense

Lacrosse games don't get made by big fancy game companies because the sport isn't big enough to make money on a game unfortunately.  However, we feel like it is important for the lacrosse community to have a VR game, so we started this project. We try to publish new features every few weeks and are open to feature requests via DM or email. Since we launched over 1 year ago we have published 6 new game modes! Please be patient with us as we develop this game for this great community!  Your support is super appreciated!!!

I bought this game once a while back and ended up refunding it because I didn’t see much potential with where they were at. Then I see an Instagram ad for it the other day and it looks leaps and bounds ahead of where it was when I got it the first time and I decided to reinvest. This time I was not disappointed. It has come a long way and the developers seem to have a real passion for adding more to the game and taking suggestions from the fan base. Really love the defense mode, had the game for 2 hours and I’m already #1 defender in the world😎. All that being said, it is a lot of fun but it is still an app lab game so expect bugs and incomplete or clunky features, that’s just the nature of the dev process. Well done.

developer_response.body: thanks for the kind words and giving us another try!  We will keeping hacking away to put out more features and clean up some of the glitches.

reviews.review_description: It's a pretty good game but sometimes the physics are wack, and the stick doesn't turn too well in your hands. Pretty cool otherwise.
I wouldn’t download this for free let alone $10!!!  The physic suck, it looks bad, my hands aren’t even synced properly, and it’s not even fun.  I want my money back this is a disgrace of a game!

developer_response.body:
Cool, grab a refund and thanks for playing.  

We will keep making the game better; today we added a goalie mode.  

Also, we are looking for more players to collaborate with on making a better game for the lacrosse community.  Hit us on instagram @laxvrgame if you want to be apart of the solution.  The big game companies neglect this market, so it will take some patience and grass roots support to make a great lacrosse VR game.

reviews.review_description: It's fun but the passing and shooting needs to be updated

I was worried it would be too technical but it was actually very easy to learn. Nice and fast graphics. The new goalie mode is really cool. It would be nice to see the ability to change stick/gear and maybe some form of online play.

developer_response.body: Thank you!  We will look at stick/gear options and online play for sure

reviews.review_title: Good but definitely needs some work
reviews.review_description: It's ok but it definitely needs some work on the physics, especially in goalie mode. The sick handling dosnt feel right and shots that would have hit my body go into the goal. And the movement feels off. 3/5 tho

developer_response.body: we are working on it.  Thanks for the feedback.  try us again, we make improvements every few weeks.

reviews.review_description: This game is solid but the problem is what I encountered multiple bugs including shooting from behind the net, flying up, getting flung, and a lot more but overall its a good game!
It’s an amazing game all around but if you can add multiplayer or 2v2 3v3 modes it would be amazing.

I have had this game for a while and I love it but when I logged in a minute ago my controllers were huge. Then I went into wall ball and everything was 10x bigger? The game used to be normal size but now this. And it doesn’t say I need an update.

developer_response.body: Sorry, some users appear to be having scaling issues with this new release.  We just released a fix for this.  In wall ball, we did make the wall a bigger, so that will appear bigger, but your stick, the ball, and everything else should be "Normal" size.  If you continue to experience any issues, email us brian@duperstudios.com or @laxvrgame on IG.  or Discord.  thanks.

reviews.review_description: Good game
I would just make it so u can edit factors during training, like how hard the shooter is shooting during the goalie drills.

developer_response.body: thanks for the feedback.  Agreed we should make the drills customizable for sure.

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun to play as a lacrosse player, I’ve been looking for a game to play that was lacrosse related and I finally found one, needs a lot of improvement however it’s still good.

reviews.review_title: Great game but has room for improvement
reviews.review_description: LAX VR is a great game if you want to play pole, goalie, or attack/midfielder.  As someone who plays lacrosse in real like I do love when I get to play games in a season to play against new teams which in my opinion is something that this game needs. In the goalie position I do wish you couldn’t see a body but a body would be there for you to block shots not just your stick and sometimes I have noticed that the ball goes through the mesh on the stick so that can be improved. On all the positions to I wish there was a way to specifically pass it correct me if I’m wrong. But I don’t love the defense physics but please add poles to the teams not just players and please please please have better shooting physics. I have tried to shoot it so many times but it just doesn’t go out and shoot. Also please fix the penalty call about crease violation. But overall this is a great game especially if you love lacrosse it’s a great use of your money and I hope this review helped.

I really like the game and the concept. Fun to play and compete on a leaderboard. As a goalie, off hand, low clockwise saves seem hard due to my hand positioning, but I’m trying to see if it relates to my real-world technique. Overall, really fun!

This game is awesome but I want them to add a full season not just tournaments and I want them to add more challenges and more places to play because it’s the same place every time you play a game and add like a full field game not just sixes because in sixes there isn’t any poles so yeah add a field game and can you guys start making logos for the teams and add them to the field. Thanks
Sometimes this game pisses me off because when i try to shoot it passes it to another teammate

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback.  Our next version - coming in days - will lock in the shot even if you briefly lose eye focus with the goal to a teammate.  It will also introduce a tourney mode, long poles in 6v6 and custom color jerseys.

reviews.review_description: This game is actually not as bad as i thought it would be. As a lacrosse player this is actually really fun, but it may be should be worked on a little more, there are bugs and glitches u get sometimes, and the character  models need to be updated there scary looking.
Love the goalie mode but I find the shooting mode a little hard to play

developer_response.body: Thank you JJRamsay!!!  We will put some thoughts into how to make shooting mode a bit easier.  Personally, I find you have to shoot before the defender arrives. And while you can use the thumbstick to move around a bit, it is hard to separate from the defender.

reviews.review_description: Give me a refund I'm begging if u see this

developer_response.body: Meta handles all refunds and gives a generous 14 days for you to play and try.  Sorry to see you go, come back when we drop tourney mode, next week.

reviews.review_title: Rlly great Game for the price
reviews.review_description: Game is great and personally I am a goalie and love the inovation, however im not the tallest goalie but the goal is double my height and not accurate to 6ft, I would love to see a hight imput so that shooters can play not so giant defenders, and goalies can see more accuratw shots, i will definitly be using the game alot though, just hope to see some new player friendsly systems.

developer_response.body: thanks for the kind words!  We did just update the game today to address the goalie height issue. Thanks for the support; the lacrosse community has been great and helping nurture our game!!!!

reviews.review_description: Its super fun but i wish i could be able to have my top hand slide on my stick
I’m telling y’all when you get used to the controls of the game you’ll have a blast! It just hate you have to press a button to shoot it. I would prefer just flinging it

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback.  We experimented with a buttonless mechanic, its in the Medicine Game mode.  We found it really hard to cradle, and get accuracy in shooting.  We will keep looking at it though.
